s2.description: Add JWT_SECRET to backend/.env: append JWT_SECRET=your-secret-key-here to the end of the file (generate a secure random string)

s6.description: Create backend/routes/data.js: implement CRUD endpoints for data management: GET / (list all), GET /:id (get by id), POST / (create new), PUT /:id (update), DELETE /:id (delete). Use express-validator for input validation on POST and PUT. Export Express router.

s7.description: Create backend/server.js: import express, cors, and all route modules. Configure Express app with cors middleware, json body parser, and mount routes at /api/auth, /api/users, /api/data. Export app module.

s8.description: Update backend/index.js: add require statement for server.js app module, and add app.listen to start the server on PORT from env. Keep existing database pool connection code.

r2_r1_s1.description: Update backend/package.json to add new dependencies: Replace the entire file content to add express, bcryptjs, jsonwebtoken, express-validator, and cors to the dependencies object. The new dependencies object should contain: pg (^8.7.3), dotenv (^16.0.2), express, bcryptjs, jsonwebtoken, express-validator, and cors. Use sr block with SEARCH/REPLACE to modify only the dependencies section.

s1.description: Create backend/routes/auth.js with Express authentication routes including POST /register with bcrypt hashing and JWT generation, POST /login with password verification and JWT generation, express-validator input validation, proper error handling, and module.exports for the router

Phase 3: Frontend Core Development. Initialize React application in frontend/ directory using Vite. Create React Router configuration for navigation. Implement authentication components: Login page with form validation, Registration page with form validation, and Logout functionality. Develop user profile management: personal information display and profile editing functionality. Implement API integration: Axios configuration with interceptors for JWT token, response handling, error management, and token storage in localStorage.

s1.description: Fix Phase 3 Frontend bugs. 1) Update frontend/src/components/Login.js: use apiClient from '../api', call POST /api/auth/login with { email, password }, add navigate('/profile') on success after storing token. 2) Update frontend/src/components/Register.js: use apiClient, call POST /api/auth/register with { username, email, password }, add navigate('/login') on success. 3) Update frontend/src/components/UserProfile.js: use apiClient, call GET /api/users/id with stored user id from token. 4) Create frontend/src/components/Logout.js: clear localStorage token, redirect to /login. 5) Update frontend/src/main.js: use ReactDOM.createRoot instead of deprecated ReactDOM.render. 6) Fix backend/routes/auth.js: use process.env.JWT_SECRET instead of hardcoded string, use actual database queries instead of commented User model.
